# Table I — PCA-2 Wind-Tunnel, Pitch 1.9°, Protuberances EXPOSED

**Source: page_09.png (paper p.9), NACA TR 515 (Wheatley & Hood 1935).**

Tests at four nominal rotor speeds (~98, 119, 138, 148 rpm).
Coefficients are in **airplane axes** (Wheatley's convention) — see
`nomenclature.png` for definitions. To convert to rotor-axis (CT, CH, CY),
transform via the shaft angle α; see Harris CR-2008-215370 §5.3.

**Confidence: MODERATE.** Extracted from the PDF text layer with a
position-aware parser, then filtered by an internal-consistency check
L/D = CL/CD within 10% and plausibility ranges on every cell. Of 87
raw rows in the source table, 60 passed; the remaining 27 had OCR
damage (split decimals, dropped digits in N or α, e.g. `N='9.8'` for
`98.8`, `N='13a.5'` for `138.5`). Recover them from `page_09.png` if
needed.

Column key — μ tip-speed ratio | α shaft angle of attack (deg) |
CL lift coefficient | CD drag coefficient | L/D lift-drag ratio |
N rotor rpm | C_l rolling moment coef | C_m pitching moment coef |
C_y lateral force coef.

| μ | α (deg) | CL | CD | L/D | N (rpm) | C_l | C_m | C_y |
